name: wtr-lab-term-replacer-webpack
description: A modular, Webpack-powered TypeScript version of the WTR Lab Term Replacer userscript.
author: MasuRii

scripts.build: npm run version:update && npm run typecheck && webpack --mode=production
scripts.build:performance: npm run typecheck && webpack --config webpack.config.js --config-name performance --mode=production
scripts.build:greasyfork: npm run typecheck && webpack --config webpack.config.js --config-name greasyfork --mode=production
scripts.build:devbundle: npm run typecheck && webpack --config webpack.config.js --config-name dev --mode=development
